result.status_detail: T1b envelope (ERNIE-native single-event with markdown-yiyan + Search-Lightning + endTurn=true) delivered successfully at network layer (1.1 kB body, 30 percent larger than blocked 0.7 kB, significantly smaller than benign 21.5 kB which had 60+ events), but client did NOT render the warning. Chat area stuck at Understanding placeholder. No 보안 경고 text visible. rendered_text_content is empty (placeholder only). EventStream tab shows 0 events despite 1.1 kB body transferred -- suggests SSE framing may be missing or the event JSON is structurally valid but baidu client-side rendering logic did not pick up the injected markdown-yiyan component. Further envelope iteration needed.

devtools_evidence.response_body_reason: DevTools 'Failed to load response data' (already finished loading; Chrome not buffering)
devtools_evidence.page_behavior: URL transitioned chat.baidu.com/?enter_type=chat_url -> chat.baidu.com/search?enter_type=chat_url&internal=1; chat stuck at Understanding placeholder

service_rev.change_tested: baidu_sse_v6_keepalive envelope replaced with ERNIE-native single event (markdown-yiyan + Search-Lightning + endTurn=true + isFinished=true + data.value=MESSAGE)

notes: cycle 92 M0 empirical comparison single candidate failed at rendering layer. Network path works (1.1 kB body transferred vs 0.7 kB pure-block). Hypothesis: baidu client-side rendering pipeline may require (a) SSE event framing (data: prefix + newline separators) around the JSON, (b) additional intermediate seq_id events before the endTurn=true final event (streaming pattern requires multiple packages), or (c) additional required fields not captured in 538 schema inspection (schema was from seq 59-64 mid-stream -- earliest events seq 1-10 may have distinct bootstrap shape). Recommend next iteration: capture seq_id 1-5 explicitly (e.g. via longer baidu answer with pre-scroll to bottom of EventStream) to check if early events differ structurally from the mid-stream samples we obtained.
